zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March於大約1335年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood26歲，母親Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March37歲。他於1361年與Christina Seton在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1385年登記服兵役。他去世於1420年3月在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年86歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March于大约1335年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood26岁，母亲Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March37岁。他于1361年与Christina Seton在苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1385年登记服兵役。他去世于1420年3月在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年86岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March was born about 1335, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, was 37. He married Christina Seton in 1361, in Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1385. He died in March 1420, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 86, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotlan: Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March est né environ 1335, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Christina Seton en 1361, à Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1385. Il est décédé en mars 1420, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March um 1335 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March 37. Er hat 1361 in Midlothian, Scotland Christina Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1385 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im März 1420 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March è nato il circa 1335 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Christina Seton nel 1361, nel Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1385. Morì nel marzo 1420, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of Marchが約1335年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwoodは26歳，母Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and Marchは37歳であった。1361年にスコットランドミドロスアンでChristina Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年に兵役登録をした。彼は1420年3月にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで86歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(이)가 대략 1335년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1361년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 Christina Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1420년 3월 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Seton em 1361, em Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1385. Ele faleceu em março de 1420, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March родился около 1335 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Seton в 1361 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1385 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер марта 1420 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Spynie, Moray, Scotland: New Spynie, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March nació aproximadamente 1335, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Christina Seton en 1361, en Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1385. Murió en marzo de 1420, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
